title: Alternative HUD for PyroFrost
body:
Alternative HUD for [PyroFrost](https://modrinth.com/mod/pyrofrost) by [TalonFloof](https://modrinth.com/user/TalonFloof)

Made this for my new modpack but wanted to share it separately as well :)

This resource pack gives a gauge/meter to the HUD with a new design. It's more of a personal preference but it helped me understand how hot/cold it was in the game more, as it gives obvious info on the temperature where arrow to the left is cold and to the right is hot! For specifics I'd recommend looking at the gallery to see if you like it.
